Value: Ice Dish with Tosaka seaweed, decoration, individual scallop shells for serving.
shellfish, capcasin, alcohol, gluten, allium, ginger
Unit: ea, Qty: 0.75, Prep: cut in 6ths.
Unit: gr, Qty: 2.0, Prep: cold lime cheeks
Plant sudare bamboo decoration and bamboo leaf in ice.
Add tosaka seaweed and kyogi catch signs, set aside.
In a mixing bowl add scallop, lime juice, cilantro chifenade and kosher salt. Mix well
Add Aji Lime Sauce, mix well and transfer to scallop shell.
Add burnt orange, pickled starfruit, avocado puree, then furikake, maldon and micro cilantro.
Place scallop shells over ice bowl to serve.
